information_access: Candidate test forecasts only; realized demand is attached after selection for evaluation.
switching_cost_handling: No selector switching cost; one candidate model is fixed for the strategy.

information_access: Validation WAPE selects one global model; test actuals are unavailable during selection.
switching_cost_handling: No within-series switching cost because one model is fixed.

information_access: Validation family WAPE maps each family to a model; test actuals are unavailable during selection.
fallback_possible: Yes; missing family mapping falls back to Global Best.
switching_cost_handling: No within-series switching cost because each family-series uses one model.

information_access: Candidate test forecasts only; equal weights are fixed before evaluation.
switching_cost_handling: No discrete model switching; selected model is a constant ensemble strategy.

information_access: Validation normalized planning loss determines model weights; test actuals are unavailable during selection.
fallback_possible: Yes; empty weights fall back to equal weights.
switching_cost_handling: No discrete model switching; model weights are fixed after validation.

information_access: Validation inventory cost per demand unit selects one fixed model.
fallback_possible: Yes; falls back to validation WAPE if inventory losses are unavailable.
switching_cost_handling: No within-series switching cost because one model is fixed.

information_access: Validation planning-signal volatility selects one fixed model.
fallback_possible: Yes; falls back to Global Best if stability estimates are unavailable.
switching_cost_handling: No within-series switching cost because one model is fixed.

information_access: Validation WAPE plus current forecast-implied plan movement; test actuals are unavailable during selection.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty in one-step score.

information_access: Validation expected WAPE and inventory cost plus current forecast-implied transition burden; test actuals are unavailable during selection.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty; Favorita also supports minimum-utility-gain hysteresis.
switching_logic: Stateful greedy feasibility selector by series.

information_access: Validation-derived expected costs plus current forecast-implied transition burden.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty in current-period operational cost.

information_access: Validation-derived expected costs plus forecast-implied transitions over the finite horizon.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty accumulated in the DP objective.

information_access: Validation-derived expected costs plus forecast-implied transitions over the finite horizon.
hard_switch_budget: Yes; max_switches K is enforced in DP state.
fallback_possible: Yes; one-step greedy fallback with warning if no budget-feasible path remains.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty plus hard switch-count budget.
switching_logic: Finite-horizon DP with model and switch-count state.

information_access: Validation expected costs select candidate models; smoothing alpha is fixed by config.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty in selector score; smoothing reduces executed plan jumps.
switching_logic: Greedy selection with gradual planning-signal adaptation.

information_access: Validation expected costs select candidate models; smoothing alpha comes from execution-risk scenario config.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty; smoothing speed varies by scenario.
switching_logic: Greedy selection with scenario-based gradual adaptation.

information_access: Blocked validation CV chooses smoothing alpha; test actuals are unavailable during selection.
fallback_possible: Yes; defaults to alpha 0.50 if CV scores are unavailable.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty; validation CV selects adaptation speed.

information_access: Validation WAPE determines nonnegative model weights.
fallback_possible: Yes; invalid or empty weights normalize to equal weights.
switching_cost_handling: No discrete switching; weights are fixed after validation.

information_access: Validation normalized operational loss determines nonnegative model weights.
fallback_possible: Yes; invalid or empty weights normalize to equal weights.
switching_cost_handling: No discrete switching; weights are fixed after validation.

information_access: Blocked validation CV chooses a nonnegative blend of accuracy and operational weights.
fallback_possible: Yes; falls back to normalized operational or accuracy weights.
switching_cost_handling: No discrete switching; weights are fixed after validation.

information_access: Validation WAPE plus test-realized inventory-cost map; diagnostic upper bound only.
switching_cost_handling: Soft lambda_switch penalty in the Oracle DP objective.

information_access: Realized test demand is used as the forecast; diagnostic upper bound only.
switching_cost_handling: No switching cost; selected model is a constant oracle strategy.
